heading: Frequently Asked
description: Find answers to common questions about our asset management software and implementation.

items.question: What is asset management software?
items.answer: Asset management software helps organizations track, maintain, and optimize physical and digital assets across locations with real-time visibility and audit-ready records.

items.question: Can this work for multiple sites and departments?
items.answer: Yes. You can manage assets across plants, warehouses, offices, and remote locations from one centralized platform with role-based access.

items.question: Does it support RFID, BLE, and barcode tracking?
items.answer: Tag RoBo Tech supports RFID, BLE, barcode, GPS, and IoT integrations so you can choose the right tracking method for each asset type.

items.question: How long does implementation take?
items.answer: Most deployments begin with a pilot in a few weeks. Full rollout timelines depend on asset volume, integrations, and site count.
